---
mode: 'ask'
description: 'Add short inline comments to the functions in the file I point to.'
---
Add brief inline comments to the functions in the file I specify.

- One-line comment above each function explaining what it does
- No strict format required — plain English is fine
- Do not restructure or reformat the existing code
- Do not touch Swagger, README, or any other file

## Output Location & Naming

Write the documented version to a **new file** — do not modify the original source file:
```
api/generated/prompt-file-docs-basic/{source-basename}.{YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}.documented.ts
```

- `{source-basename}` — name of the source file without extension (e.g. `suppliersRepo` from `suppliersRepo.ts`)
- `{YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}` — current date and time (e.g. `20260302-143000`)

Example: `api/generated/prompt-file-docs-basic/suppliersRepo.20260302-143000.documented.ts`

As the **very first line** of the output file, add:

```typescript
// 🤖 Generated by: prompt-file-docs-basic | {source-basename}.ts | {YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss}
```
